name: INTERNATIONAL BUSINESS MACHINES CORP
summary: International Business Machines Corporation (IBM) provides hybrid cloud and artificial intelligence (AI) technology solutions to enterprise clients. IBM operates through Software, Consulting, Infrastructure, and Financing segments. Its offerings include hybrid cloud platforms, AI tools, business consulting, systems integration, application development, mission-critical server and storage infrastructure, and client financing. IBM serves clients globally, helping them with digital transformation, workflow modernization, and operational efficiency.
